name: Triceps Brachii

landmarks.notes: Receives substantial indirect work from all pressing; the long head especially responds to overhead (lengthened) training. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: ~2x/week direct, on top of pressing involvement.
training_notes: Include an overhead extension to load the long head at length (see maeo-2023-triceps-overhead), plus a pushdown for the lateral/medial heads.
